publishedAbstract: * After fresh deployment of standalone MCG of ODF v4.14 with nfs pvc as backend storage, the backingstore stuck in Rejected Phase with error "NO_CAPACITY" * After upgrading ODF to ODF v4.14, the backingstore with nfs pvc as backend storage stuck in Rejected Phase with error "NO_CAPACITY": ~~~ [root@bastion ~]# oc get backingstore NAME TYPE PHASE AGE noobaa-default-backing-store pv-pool Rejected 38m [root@bastion ~]# oc describe backingstore noobaa-default-backing-store...... Last Heartbeat Time: 2024-03-21T09:06:23Z Last Transition Time: 2024-03-21T09:06:23Z Message: BackingStorePhaseRejected Reason: Backing store mode: NO_CAPACITY Status: Unknown Type: Upgradeable Mode: Mode Code: NO_CAPACITY Time Stamp: 2024-03-21 08:30:41.310774175 +0000 UTC m=+708.964659352 Phase: Rejected Events: Type Reason Age From Message------------------------- Warning BackingStorePhaseRejected 40s (x370 over 35m) noobaa-operator Backing store mode: NO_CAPACITY ~~~
publishedTitle: The backingstore backend with nfs pvc of Standalone MCG stuck in Rejected Phase with error "NO_CAPACITY"
